# Manan Upadhyay — Senior Full Stack Developer (MERN / Next.js)

> Manan Upadhyay is a Senior Full Stack Developer with 5+ years of experience building scalable, production-grade web platforms in the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express, React.js, Node.js), Next.js, and TypeScript.

Manan engineers full-stack solutions across finance, healthcare, logistics, and SaaS — from large-scale enterprise platforms (including Advisor Portfolio Snapshot and Digital Investor for Capital Group, USA) to multi-tenant CRM/ERP systems with RBAC and JWT auth, and highly animated, media-heavy frontends. Core stack: React.js, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind, Redux, React Query, GSAP, Framer Motion (frontend); Node.js, Express, NestJS, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Firebase (backend); Docker, AWS, Okta, Cloudflare R2, Harness, Splunk, Cypress (DevOps/CI/CD). Based in Ahmedabad, India.

## Portfolio

- [The Chronicle — main portfolio](https://www.upadhyaymanan.in/): Cinematic, scroll-directed portfolio covering Manan's craft, experience, skills, and project case studies.
- [The Atelier — making-of](https://www.upadhyaymanan.in/making-of): A behind-the-scenes breakdown of how the portfolio was designed and engineered.

## Selected work

- [Gajaakriti Studio](https://gajaakriti.com/): Pixel-perfect, highly animated luxury wedding photography platform built with Next.js.
- [Royal Tiles Playground](https://florra.tatkrit.com/login): Heavy visual tile-visualization tool using React, TensorFlow.js, and custom SVG rendering.

## Profiles

- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/mananupadhyay01/): Professional profile, roles, and experience.
- [GitHub](https://github.com/manan-upadhyay): Source code and open-source work.

## Contact

- [Hire or reach Manan](https://www.upadhyaymanan.in/#contact): Get in touch through the raven terminal on the main site for full-stack engineering work, from early-stage startups to large-scale enterprise systems.
